narrative: Power becomes trustworthy when force is proportioned, vows are kept, and pressure is converted into form rather than drama.
prediction_focus: leadership tests, contracts, reputation, durable commitments
ritual_actions: Name one vow worth keeping for the next month.
Choose the slower durable action over the flashy one.
Tighten one boundary that leaks authority or time.

narrative: The psyche becomes most legible through images, dreams, moods, and charged atmospheres before it becomes legible through plain argument.
prediction_focus: emotional revelations, dream material, private healing, hidden motives
ritual_actions: Write down the first dream fragment you remember for seven mornings.
Notice which rooms, songs, or people change the atmosphere instantly.
Give one buried feeling a clean symbolic form in writing.
shadow_watch: being swept by atmosphere instead of discerning it

narrative: Meaning arrives by pattern, comparison, and correspondence: one thing illuminates another when the mind learns to read relation instead of isolated fact.
prediction_focus: study breakthroughs, messages, writing, alliances, teaching
ritual_actions: Track three repeating symbols or phrases this week.
Turn one confusing event into a written pattern map.
Teach or explain what you are learning to someone else.

narrative: A threshold is crossed through tested action: the self becomes more real by taking up the right difficulty voluntarily.
prediction_focus: launches, declarations, creative exposure, travel, belief-testing
ritual_actions: Do the visible brave thing you have been postponing.
Let the body register commitment through one concrete action.
Trade performative certainty for embodied courage.

narrative: Power gathers when the vessel is prepared: atmosphere, beauty, and vow shape the field that attraction can safely inhabit.
prediction_focus: partnership definition, home aesthetics, embodied value, emotional contracts
ritual_actions: Refine one room, agreement, or practice so it can hold more life.
Ask whether attraction is being given a trustworthy container.
Consecrate one daily act with steadiness rather than intensity.

narrative: Truth arrives in crossed currents: one thing is said, another is shown, and discernment is forged by comparing the two without collapsing them.
prediction_focus: hard conversations, symbolic reversals, hidden motives, pattern recognition
ritual_actions: Write the literal story and the symbolic story side by side.
Notice what repeats across dream, dialogue, and circumstance.
Delay final judgment until the second signal appears.
